title: Relaxdays Laundry Basket with Seat, Country Style, Laundry Bin, Wood & Fabric, Bathroom Stool HxWxD: 55x41x41 cm, White
features: 2 in 1: Sturdy laundry box with seat - A practical helper and eye-catcher in every bathroom
For laundry: Collect dirty laundry in the square laundry chest - Laundry bin volume: approx. 40 l
Comfy: Chic wooden laundry basket with comfortable cushion as a seat in the bathroom or bedroom
Design: White laundry bin with cream-coloured cushions - Laundry pouf in classic country house style
Basics: Bathroom stool Dimensions HxWxD: app. 55x41x41 cm - Load capacity: app. 100 kg
description: This stool with storage space is especially suitable for small bathrooms. It can be used as a practical laundry basket or as storage space for towels. The comfortable cushion, which is also the lid of the laundry box, offers a cosy seat for putting on socks, doing nails or shaving. The combination of white pine wood and cream-coloured seat cushions makes the bathroom laundry basket a classic representative of the country house style.Laundry Basket With Seat Details- Total dimensions H x W x D: approx. 55 x 41 x 41 cm- Dimensions storage space H x W x D: approx. 37 x 34 x 34 cm- Volume laundry basket: approx. 40 l- Ground clearance: approx. 11 cm- Load capacity: max. 100 kg- Weight: approx. 4.3 kg- Material: pine wood, MDF, fabric (polyester, cotton)- Colour: whiteBathroom Stool With Storage Space- Ideal for collecting dirty laundry- Stow towels inside to save space- Convinces with its comfortable, upholstered seat- Chic piece of furniture in classic country house style- Assembly with instructions is quick and easyIncluded in Delivery- 1x seat laundry chest in individual parts- With instructions and assembly material- Decorative items are not included in the scope of delivery
